visual_description: A man in a grey sweater sits at a table holding a piece of paper and gesturing with his hands while speaking to another man. The second man, wearing a black jacket over a white shirt, leans over the table in a kitchen area, looking down at the paper. A red plastic cup sits on the table.
audio_description: The audio consists of the man in the grey sweater speaking and the other man listening quietly.
